question: What is LeBron James's height?
gold: SELECT height FROM common_player_info WHERE display_first_last = 'LeBron James';
pred: SELECT height FROM common_player_info WHERE first_name = "LeBron" AND last_name = "James"

question: How many players are currently active?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM player WHERE is_active = 1;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM player

question: How many home games did the Lakers play in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE team_name_home = 'Los Angeles Lakers' AND season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season';
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game AS T1 JOIN game_summary AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.game_id JOIN team_history AS T3 ON T2.team_id_home = T3.team_id_home WHERE T3.city = "Lakers" AND T3.year_founded = 2022-23

question: Which team had the highest average home points per game in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, AVG(pts_home) AS avg_pts FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY avg_pts DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN other_stats AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.game_id JOIN season AS T3 ON T2.season_id = T3.season_id WHERE T3.season_id = 2022-23 GROUP BY T1.team_name_home ORDER BY avg(T2.pts_home) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which teams had a home win rate above 70% in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, SUM(CASE WHEN wl_home = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS win_rate FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home HAVING win_rate > 0.7;
pred: SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T2.team_wins_losses_home > 70

question: Find active players who were the number one overall pick in the draft.
gold: SELECT c.display_first_last FROM common_player_info c JOIN draft_history d ON c.person_id = CAST(d.person_id AS TEXT) WHERE d.overall_pick = '1' AND c.rosterstatus = 'Active';
pred: SELECT T1.id FROM player AS T1 JOIN draft_history AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.player_id WHERE T2.overall_pick = 1

question: Which team had the highest 3-point shooting percentage at home across all playoff games?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, AVG(fg3_pct_home) AS avg_3p FROM game WHERE season_type = 'Playoffs' AND fg3_pct_home IS NOT NULL GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY avg_3p DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home GROUP BY T1.team_name_home ORDER BY max(T2.fg3_pct_home) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What different types of games are recorded in the NBA?
gold: SELECT DISTINCT season_type FROM game ORDER BY season_type;
pred: SELECT DISTINCT draft_type FROM draft_history WHERE nba_flag = '1'

question: What arena do the Los Angeles Lakers play in?
gold: SELECT arena FROM team_details WHERE abbreviation = 'LAL';
pred: SELECT arena FROM team_details WHERE city = "Los Angeles"

question: Which team had the most total home losses in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, COUNT(*) AS losses FROM game WHERE wl_home = 'L' AND season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY losses DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM team AS T1 JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home JOIN season AS T3 ON T2.season_id = T3.season_id GROUP BY T1.team_name_home ORDER BY sum(T2.team_wins_losses_home) DESC LIMIT 2022-23

question: How many games in the 2022-23 regular season ended with the home team scoring at least 130 points?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND pts_home >= 130;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game AS T1 JOIN game_summary AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.game_id JOIN season AS T3 ON T2.season_id = T3.season_id WHERE T1.season = 2022-23 AND T2.game_date_est = "2022-23" AND T3.game_date_est = "2022-23" AND T3.min = 130

question: What was the average weight of players at the 2022 NBA Draft Combine?
gold: SELECT AVG(weight) FROM draft_combine_stats WHERE season = '2022';
pred: SELECT avg(weight) FROM draft_combine_stats WHERE season = 2022 AND draft_year = 2022

question: In the 2021-22 regular season, what was the average total points scored in a game (home + away)?
gold: SELECT AVG(pts_home + pts_away) FROM game WHERE season_id = '22021' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND pts_home IS NOT NULL AND pts_away IS NOT NULL;
pred: SELECT avg(T1.total_turnovers_home) FROM game AS T1 JOIN line_score AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.game_id JOIN other_stats AS T3 ON T2.game_id = T3.game_id WHERE T1.season_id = 2021-22

question: How many regular season games in 2022-23 were decided by overtime (non-empty ot period minutes)?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND min > 240;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game AS T1 JOIN game_summary AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.game_id WHERE T2.live_period_time_bcast = "2022-23" AND T1.season = "regular"

question: What is the maximum single-game home team rebound total in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT MAX(reb_home) FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season';
pred: SELECT max(team_rebounds_home) FROM other_stats WHERE team_id_home = "single-game" AND season_exp = 2022-23

question: How many of the top 10 picks in the 2003 NBA Draft are on record?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM draft_history WHERE season = '2003' AND CAST(overall_pick AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM draft_history AS T1 JOIN draft_combine_stats AS T2 ON T1.season = T2.season WHERE T2.season_exp = 2003 AND T1.round_pick = 10

question: Which team had the best free throw percentage at home in the 2022-23 regular season, among teams with at least 41 home games?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, AVG(ft_pct_home) AS avg_ft FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND ft_pct_home IS NOT NULL GROUP BY team_name_home HAVING COUNT(*) >= 41 ORDER BY avg_ft DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN season AS T2 ON T1.season_id = T2.season_id JOIN team AS T3 ON T2.team_id_home = T3.team_id_home WHERE T2.season_id = 2022-23 AND T3.team_id_home = 41

question: How many 2022-23 regular season games had both teams score at least 120 points?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND pts_home >= 120 AND pts_away >= 120;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game AS T1 JOIN line_score AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.game_id JOIN season AS T3 ON T2.season_id = T3.season_id WHERE T1.game_date_est = "2022-23" AND T3.min = 120

question: In the 2021-22 regular season, how many home games did the Golden State Warriors win?

question: Find teams that lost at home by 30 or more points at least once in the 2022-23 regular season (home score minus away score <= -30).
gold: SELECT DISTINCT team_name_home FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND pts_home - pts_away <= -30 ORDER BY team_name_home LIMIT 10;
pred: SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM team AS T1 JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home JOIN season AS T3 ON T2.season_id = T3.season_id WHERE T2.game_date_est = "2022-23" AND T3.season_id = "regular" GROUP BY T1.team_name_home HAVING avg(T2.pts_off_to_home) > 30 INTERSECT SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM team AS T1 JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T2.game_date_est = "2022-23" AND T3.season_id = "regular"

question: How many players drafted in 2014 have player profile information on record?

question: What was the league-wide average home points per game for the 2020-21, 2021-22, and 2022-23 regular seasons?

question: Which team had the largest decrease in average home scoring from 2021-22 to 2022-23?
gold: SELECT a.team_name_home, (b.avg_pts - a.avg_pts) AS decrease FROM (SELECT team_name_home, AVG(pts_home) AS avg_pts FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home) a JOIN (SELECT team_name_home, AVG(pts_home) AS avg_pts FROM game WHERE season_id = '22021' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home) b ON a.team_name_home = b.team_name_home ORDER BY decrease DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T1.team_name_home FROM team AS T1 JOIN line_score AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T2.largest_lead_home = 2021-22 AND T2.largest_lead_home = 2022-23 GROUP BY T1.team_name_home ORDER BY avg(T2.largest_lead_home) DESC LIMIT 1
